TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ciku, title = Ciku, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ciku} }

S.FORM: Ciku Itiniay i Hualien Cen no Hualien ko Ciku a niyaro', 2,828 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 6,794 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 58% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 3,939 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 42% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 2,855 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 37%, Bunun 4%, Tayal 3%, Paiwan 2%, Truku 8%, Puyuma 1%, Sakizaya 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ʦiko~u~u itiniaj i ħo~u~uaɾiən ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ʦiko~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%, paiwan *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, saki*aja *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Ciku Itiniay i Hualien Cen no Hualien ko Ciku a niyaro', 2,828 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 6,794 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 58% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 3,939 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 42% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 2,855 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 37%, Bunun 4%, Tayal 3%, Paiwan 2%, Truku 8%, Puyuma 1%, Sakizaya 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ʦiko~u~u itiniaj i ħo~u~uaɾiən ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ʦiko~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%, paiwan *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, saki*aja *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
